configurations.name: Python 3.12 - venv/pip

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && python3.12 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt

configurations.description: Python 3.12 标准环境 (venv): 适用于大多数标准 Python 项目。使用内置 venv 创建虚拟环境，pip 安装依赖。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Standard (venv): Best for standard projects. Uses built-in venv and pip.

configurations.name: Python 3.12 - Poetry

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && poetry env use python3.12 && poetry config virtualenvs.in-project true && poetry install

configurations.description: Python 3.12 工程化环境 (Poetry): 适用于需要严格依赖锁定的生产级项目。自动管理虚拟环境和依赖图。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.12 Engineering (Poetry): For production projects requiring strict dependency locking.

configurations.name: Python 3.11 - uv/pip

commands.install: cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && uv venv --python 3.11 && uv pip install -r requirements.txt

configurations.description: Python 3.11 极速环境 (uv): 适用于追求极致安装速度的项目。使用 Rust 编写的 uv 工具替代 pip/venv。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.11 High Performance (uv): For fastest setup. Uses Rust-based uv tool.

configurations.name: Python 3.10 - Global/pip
configurations.description: Python 3.10 全局环境: 适用于 Docker 容器或一次性 CI 环境。直接安装到系统路径，无虚拟环境隔离。
configurations.description_en: Python 3.10 Global: For Docker/CI. Installs directly to system path.

configurations.name: Node.js 20 - npm

commands.install: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm install
commands.start: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && npm start -- --transport=sse --port=8080

configurations.description: Node.js 20 LTS (npm): 推荐用于生产环境。使用 NVM 切换版本，npm 管理依赖。Node 20 是当前的长期支持版本。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 20 LTS (npm): Recommended for production. Uses NVM and npm.

configurations.name: Node.js 18 - Yarn

commands.install: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 18 && nvm use 18 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && yarn install
commands.start: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 18 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && yarn start -- --transport=sse --port=8080

configurations.description: Node.js 18 Legacy (yarn): 适用于旧项目维护。使用 Yarn Classic (v1) 作为包管理器。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 18 Legacy (yarn): For legacy projects using Yarn v1.

configurations.name: Node.js 22 - pnpm

commands.install: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 22 && nvm use 22 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pnpm install
commands.start: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 22 && cd /app/codepkg/mcp-sys-monitor/ && pnpm start -- --transport=sse --port=8080

configurations.description: Node.js 22 Latest (pnpm): 适用于尝鲜和高性能构建。pnpm 节省磁盘空间并加快安装速度。
configurations.description_en: Node.js 22 Latest (pnpm): For high performance using pnpm.

configurations.name: Binary - Linux
configurations.description: Linux 二进制直连: 无需任何依赖，直接运行编译好的二进制文件。适用于极简部署。
configurations.description_en: Linux Binary: Standalone executable. No dependencies required.

configurations.name: Shell - Custom Script
configurations.description: 自定义 Shell 脚本: 通过 install.sh 和 start.sh 封装复杂的启动逻辑。已优化路径解析，支持任意目录执行。
configurations.description_en: Custom Shell Script: Encapsulates logic via install.sh/start.sh. Path-aware.
